caption: A static shot captures a promotional poster for a tech event. The poster features several company logos, including "EMC²," "IBM," "pentaho," "Teradata," "bmc," "syncsort," "informatica," and "tresata." Text on the poster invites viewers to "Don't Miss the CUBE Party at #BigDataSV," noting it occurs on "February 18, 15" from "7pm-9pm" at the "Fairmont San Jose." Additional text directs viewers to "Explore Big Data Research and Analysis" at "premium.wikibon.com/big-data" and mentions "Watch live: SiliconANGLE.tv," "News: SiliconANGLE.com," and "Replays: YouTube.com/SiliconANGLE." The background is dark and out of focus, with vertical structures visible behind the poster. The scene remains virtually unchanged across the frames, showing a consistent, still image of the advertisement without any people present or movement within the shot.
